scanner_description: Detects hardcoded API keys, tokens, credentials, and high-entropy strings across 29 provider patterns plus Shannon-entropy fallback.

rules.name: AWS Access Key ID
rules.note: AWS Access Key grants API access to AWS services.
rules.remediation: Deactivate in IAM, rotate, use env vars.

rules.name: AWS Secret Access Key
rules.note: AWS Secret Key — full API access with paired Access Key.
rules.remediation: Rotate in IAM Console. Use AWS Secrets Manager.

rules.name: GitHub Personal Access Token
rules.note: GitHub PAT grants repo/org access.
rules.remediation: Revoke: GitHub → Settings → Developer Settings → PATs.

rules.name: GitHub OAuth Token
rules.note: GitHub OAuth token.
rules.remediation: Revoke in GitHub OAuth Apps settings.

rules.name: GitHub App Token
rules.note: GitHub App installation/refresh token.
rules.remediation: Regenerate in GitHub App settings.

rules.name: Stripe Live Secret Key
rules.note: Stripe live secret — can process real charges.
rules.remediation: Roll in Stripe Dashboard → API Keys.

rules.name: Stripe Publishable Key
rules.note: Stripe publishable key in non-frontend code.
rules.remediation: Only use in client-side code.

rules.name: Stripe Test Key
rules.note: Stripe test key hardcoded.
rules.remediation: Move to .env file.

rules.name: Google API Key
rules.note: Google API key — access depends on enabled APIs.
rules.remediation: Restrict in Cloud Console → Credentials. Rotate.

rules.name: Firebase Admin SDK Key
rules.note: Firebase Admin SDK key — full project admin.
rules.remediation: Revoke in Firebase Console → Service Accounts.

rules.name: Database URL with Credentials
rules.note: DB connection string with embedded credentials.
rules.remediation: Change password. Use env vars for connection strings.

rules.name: Database Password Hardcoded
rules.note: Database password in config.
rules.remediation: Move to secrets manager.

rules.name: JWT/Session Secret Hardcoded
rules.note: JWT/session secret in source — tokens can be forged.
rules.remediation: Generate 256-bit random. Store in env vars.

rules.name: Twilio Auth Token
rules.note: Twilio token — can send SMS/calls.
rules.remediation: Rotate in Twilio Console.

rules.name: SendGrid API Key
rules.note: SendGrid key — can send email as you.
rules.remediation: Delete and recreate in SendGrid → API Keys.

rules.name: Mailgun API Key
rules.note: Mailgun API key.
rules.remediation: Rotate in Mailgun Dashboard.

rules.name: Slack Bot Token
rules.note: Slack bot token — workspace access.
rules.remediation: Regenerate at api.slack.com.

rules.name: Slack Webhook
rules.note: Slack webhook — anyone can post messages.
rules.remediation: Regenerate webhook URL.

rules.name: Discord Bot Token
rules.note: Discord bot token.
rules.remediation: Reset in Discord Developer Portal.

rules.name: Supabase Service Role Key
rules.note: Supabase service key — bypasses all RLS.
rules.remediation: Never expose in client. Rotate in Supabase Dashboard.

rules.name: RSA Private Key
rules.note: RSA private key in source.
rules.remediation: Revoke certificates. Generate new key pair.

rules.name: EC Private Key
rules.note: EC private key in source.
rules.remediation: Generate new key pair.

rules.name: OpenSSH Private Key
rules.note: SSH key — grants server access.
rules.remediation: ssh-keygen -t ed25519. Remove from authorized_keys.

rules.name: Cloudflare API Token
rules.note: Cloudflare token — DNS/firewall control.
rules.remediation: Revoke in Cloudflare → API Tokens.

rules.name: Heroku API Key
rules.note: Possible Heroku API key (UUID format near 'heroku' context).
rules.remediation: Regenerate in Heroku Account Settings.

rules.name: Generic API Key
rules.note: Potential API key based on variable name + high-entropy value.
rules.remediation: Move to environment variables.

rules.name: Bearer Token Hardcoded
rules.note: Hardcoded Bearer token.
rules.remediation: Use runtime env vars.

rules.name: Password in Assignment
rules.note: Hardcoded password.
rules.remediation: Use env vars. Hash with bcrypt/argon2.

rules.name: Private Key File Reference
rules.note: Reference to private key file in source.
rules.remediation: Ensure key file is in .gitignore and not committed.

rules.name: High-Entropy String (Potential Secret)
rules.note: Entropy {entropy:.2} bits/char on {length}-char string. Likely a key or token.
rules.remediation: If secret, move to env vars. If not, suppress this finding.
